allow: Bash(node -e "const m=require\(''./teams/manifest.json''\); console.log\(''Total entries:'', m.length\); const real=m.filter\(t=>t.slug.match\(/^team-\\d+$/\)\); console.log\(''team-NN entries:'', real.length\); real.forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.slug, ''|'', t.name, ''|'', t.title.slice\(0,50\)\)\)")
